title: NLP-015-explain-transformer-architecture-bert-vs-gpt.
author: AI 面试题库
abstract:
NLP-015 Explain Transformer architecture (BERT vs GPT).

 15. Explain Transformer architecture (BERT vs GPT).
答案要点:
| 特性 | BERT | GPT |
|------|------|-----|
| 架构 | Encoder-only | Decoder-only |
| 注意力 | 双向 | 单向 (causal) |
| 训练目标 | Masked LM, NSP | Next Token Prediction |
| 优势 | 理解任务 (分类、NER) | 生成任务 (写作、对话) |
| 应用 | 问答、情感分析 | 文本生成、代码生成 |

Transformer 组件:
- Multi-Head Self-Attention
- Position-wise Feed-Forward
- Layer Normalization
- Residual Connections
- Positi...

sections.title: 15. Explain Transformer architecture (BERT vs GPT).
sections.content:
**答案要点:**
| 特性 | BERT | GPT |
|------|------|-----|
| **架构** | Encoder-only | Decoder-only |
| **注意力** | 双向 | 单向 (causal) |
| **训练目标** | Masked LM, NSP | Next Token Prediction |
| **优势** | 理解任务 (分类、NER) | 生成任务 (写作、对话) |
| **应用** | 问答、情感分析 | 文本生成、代码生成 |

**Transformer 组件:**
- Multi-Head Self-Attention
- Position-wise Feed-Forward
- Layer Normalization
- Residual Connections
- Positional Encoding

**质量评分**: 98/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
